2377680.name: Samba Space Parade Demo
2377680.description: Take your parade to the end of the universe. Samba Space Parade is an action puzzle game full of cute characters and quirky music. Recruit new players, upgrade members, and earn money as you tour the galaxy, aiming for the highest scores and entertaining the cutest alien audiences.
2377680.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙
